data.title: Acoramidis Associated with First-Ever Early and Sustained Direct Kidney-Protective Effects in ATTR-CM
data.description: The introduction of Acoramidis was linked to a quick onset of kidney protection, evidenced by a temporary decrease in eGFR due to hemodynamic effects and a 15.5% decrease in UACR by Day 28 compared to a placebo (P<0.05). Post-hoc analyses did not report any adverse kidney-related events.

data.title: Kartoon Studios Adopts Limited Duration Stockholder Rights Plan
data.description: Today in Beverly Hills, California, Kartoon Studios (NYSE American: TOON) revealed the implementation of a limited duration stockholder rights plan called the “Rights Plan”. The plan was unanimously approved by the Board of Directors and will involve a dividend distribution of one right for every outstanding share of common stock. This move is not a reaction to any particular takeover bid or acquisition proposal targeting Kartoon Studios. The record date for the dividend distribution is set for July 13, 2026.

data.title: Abaxx Exchange Reports Highest Monthly and Quarterly Trading Volume to Date, Surpassing One Million Contracts Year-to-Date
data.description: In the latest update from Abaxx Exchange, it was revealed that the trading data for June indicated a significant surge in activity, marking the highest-volume month recorded so far. The average daily open interest experienced a substantial boost, rising by an impressive 200% compared to the previous month, May. This data showcases a noteworthy increase in market participation and trading activity on the exchange during this period.
INDIA OIL MINISTER: INDIA IS WILLING TO CONSIDER BUYING A STAKE IN FOREIGN OIL, GAS PRODUCING FIELDS, OR ENTITIES

data.title: Dollar Tree, Inc. Announces $2.5 Billion Share Repurchase Authorization
data.description: In Chesapeake, Virginia, Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) revealed today that its Board of Directors has renewed the Company’s share repurchase authorization, now totaling $2.5 billion. This aligns with the limit previously set by the Board in July 2025. The fresh authorization encompasses any remaining funds from the Company’s previous program. As part of this initiative, the Company recently bought back $500 million of its common stock in June.

data.title: Polyrizon Announces Successful Results for NASARIX™ Biocompatibility Program, Supporting Advancement Towards First in Human Clinical Trial
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Raanana, Israel, Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ) revealed positive outcomes from its biocompatibility assessment of NASARIX TM Allergy Blocker nasal spray. The company, focused on intranasal hydrogels, conducted successful biological safety tests meeting specified criteria, indicating progress in the development of its innovative product.

data.title: Cleverbridge Among the First to Enable Visa’s Trusted Agent Protocol and Agentic Directory, Providing Secure Access to Approved Agents
data.description: A partnership between Cleverbridge and Visa is set to facilitate and trial agentic commerce, aiding software and SaaS firms in gearing up for safe AI-triggered transactions. The collaboration aims to bolster secure payment processing mechanisms for companies, especially those dealing in digital products and services. This initiative aligns with the ever-evolving technology landscape and the growing emphasis on secure and efficient transaction processing methods.
Nigeria: At least 48 dead in inter-communal clashes in the central-west (security report)

data.title: APi Group Completes the Acquisition of WTech Fire Group and Updates 2026 Guidance
data.description: On July 1, 2026, APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG) completed the acquisition of WTech Fire Group, a major supplier of fire sprinkler, suppression, and detection services in Europe. The deal, first revealed on April 17, 2026, enhances APi's global operations by incorporating WTech's strong fire sprinkler and suppression expertise. WTech is anticipated to bring in about $175 million in revenue to APi.

data.title: Yield-bearing stablecoin market drops 15% in Q2, ending 3-year growth streak, while Treasury-backed cryptos like BUIDL, USYC, and USDY rise.
data.description: The supply of stablecoins that generate yields decreased by 15% in the second quarter. This drop was mainly due to the contraction of sUSDe and sUSDS. However, Treasury-backed products like BUIDL, USYC, and USDY saw a continued increase during this period.

data.title: SBI Crypto to close Bitcoin mining pool after 5 years, held 12th globally with 2.2% hashrate.Shutdown on July 31.
data.description: SBI Crypto is set to terminate its Bitcoin mining pool by July 31, following over five years of operation. The pool, which held the 12th position on a global scale, accounted for approximately 2.2% of the total hashrate share.

data.title: Top National Health Plan Extends Agreement for Mental Health and Expands Dario Partnership into Cardiometabolic Care, Demonstrating Successful Multi-Condition Growth Strategy
data.description: DarioHealth Corp. (NASDAQ: DRIO) has announced that a third health plan customer is set to expand beyond the initial deployment phase. This move aligns with Dario's land-and-expand strategy, presenting a substantial opportunity to boost revenue within the current customer base. This development, revealed in New York on July 2, 2026, showcases the company's success in penetrating the market and solidifying its presence in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Nova WMC™ Expanding Adoption Across the Most Advanced Packaging Processes
data.description: In Rehovot, Israel on July 2, 2026, Nova revealed that its Nova WMC™ platform has been chosen by a prominent global foundry client for conducting measurements across multiple layers in cutting-edge packaging procedures. The decision came after a thorough assessment against competitors. Nova, trading under NASDAQ symbol NVMI, secured this significant deal, demonstrating its capabilities in the industry.

data.title: CME Group Reports Record June Average Daily Volume and Second-Highest Q2 Ever
data.description: CME Group, the top derivatives marketplace globally, announced a record-breaking June with an average daily volume (ADV) of 30.6 million contracts. This month saw all-time highs for equity index and agricultural products trading. In the second quarter, ADV reached 29.8 million contracts. These impressive numbers signify a strong performance by CME Group in June.
Syria and Lebanon sign an agreement to form a joint high committee to enhance bilateral cooperation - REPORTS

data.title: Labrador Gold Closes First Tranche of Option Agreement with Pacific Ridge and Updates Exploration at the Mariposa and Eureka Dome Projects, White Gold District, Yukon
data.description: Labrador Gold Corp. (TSX.V: LAB | FNR: 2N6) has started exploration programs for the Mariposa and Eureka Dome projects. The company closed the first part of the Option Agreement with Pacific Ridge Exploration Limited (PEX: TSXV; PEXZF: OTCQB) by making a $100,000 cash payment and issuing 800,000 common shares. The shares have a resale restriction expiring on October 30, 2026.
INDIA OIL MINISTER: INDIA COMPANIES ARE NOT SELLING FUELS TO RUSSIA

data.title: ADDING and REPLACING CoStar Group Announces Launch of CoStar Platform in France
data.description: In Paris, Costar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) has announced the launch of the Costar Platform in France. This move aims to empower investors, brokers, owners, and occupiers in France's commercial real estate market, estimated at a value of €300 billion. Costar Group, an S&P 500 company and a top player in real estate globally, will provide essential data and analytics to support success in the market. This introduction of the Costar Platform will offer key resources for navigating and thriving in France's significant commercial real estate sector.

data.title: Simplilearn Launches SkillUp - The AI-First Skilling Library Built for the Age of AI
data.description: In Plano, Texas on July 2, 2026, it was reported that with the changing landscape of work, individuals require tailored learning opportunities to address the skills gap. Access to online courses is no longer sufficient; personalized learning experiences are crucial. Simplilearn is at the forefront of offering these specialized educational tools to help learners and professionals navigate their way through this evolving work environment.

data.title: Kane Biotech Announces Results of Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Winnipeg, Manitoba - On July 2, 2026, Kane Biotech Inc. (TSX-V:KNE) released the outcome of its annual and special shareholder meeting held on June 24, 2026. The Company, also known as Kane Biotech, disclosed the voting results from the meeting.
